lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Good to see you again! Anything I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Well I have to say that mounted head looks awful.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Not to worry. If it keeps Gordon happy, so be it. Anyway, thank you for keeping our farm safe. With the beast dealt with, I've been able to get back to tanning again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tan something for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Happy to have helped. All the best.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Is this your home?

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: It is. What brings you here?

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Well you won't find anything too exciting here I'm afraid. Just farming.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well you have fun with it.
